entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Important oilseed crop, Arachis hypogaea L., grown in over 100 countries.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A frequent occurrence limiting groundnut productivity, especially in rainfed areas.

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: WUE, correlated with SCMR and SLA, important for groundnut productivity under limited water.

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READING
entities.description: SCMR, a surrogate trait for WUE.

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: SLA, a surrogate trait for WUE.

entities.name: GENETIC SYSTEM
entities.description: The system controlling the expression of SCMR and SLA.

entities.name: BREEDING PROCEDURE
entities.description: The process of improving SCMR and SLA in groundnut.

entities.description: Ability of groundnut to withstand drought conditions.
